title: Announcement of Commencement of Bankruptcy Proceedings
notes: Supports bankruptcy commencement date; distinct from the 2014-02-28 civil rehabilitation filing.

title: FTX Trading Ltd. restructuring case portal
notes: Petition date is listed on the official case portal.

title: Binance Exchange Launched Date Set
notes: Official Binance announcement stating the exchange would launch on 2017-07-14.

title: EY court record on Quadriga shutdown and CCAA protection
notes: This court record cites the January 28, 2019 shutdown and February 5, 2019 CCAA protection.

title: FinCEN fines BTC-e virtual currency exchange $110 million
notes: Primary U.S. enforcement reference.

title: A Short History of Uniswap
notes: Official Uniswap history gives 2018-11-02 as the public announcement and mainnet deployment date.

title: What is Sushi
notes: States SushiSwap was launched in August 2020.

title: Cryptopia Limited appoints Grant Thornton as liquidators
notes: States liquidators were appointed 'yesterday', supporting a 2019-05-14 operational end marker.

title: Important notice for Cryptopia account holders
notes: Confirms January 2019 hack, closure after the hack, brief reopening, and liquidation in May 2019.

title: Binance About Us
notes: About page states Binance was launched in July 2017. Snapshot date normalized from undated static about page observation.

title: Introducing Uniswap v3
notes: States Uniswap v1 launched in November 2018.

title: Introducing Sushi's New Head Chef: Jared Grey
notes: Official Sushi blog notes that Sushi launched in August 2020.
